_case: pnpm-lock.yaml + docker-compose.yml, --with-docker NOT set — reports the compose file it found and the reason it's not being started. The operator sees the compose file exists but stays in charge of `up -d`.

expected.stdout:
PM: pnpm
+ pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts
COMPOSE: docker-compose.yml
COMPOSE: --with-docker not set; skipping 'up -d'.
